prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS7 (7.0L V8, 427ci, Gen IV)** with forged internals (Callies DragonSlayer crank, Manley H-beam rods, Mahle 2618 alloy pistons) and a custom camshaft (Comp Cams 281HR, 0.617" lift, 236°/242° duration) for high-RPM powerband targeting 650whp on E85 with a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** (12psi boost, intercooled with a PWR dual-core heat exchanger).

Full **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, ID1000 injectors, and a **Turbosmart e-Boost2** boost controller for precise supercharger management. Custom 3" stainless steel exhaust with **MagnaFlow Competition Series mufflers** and 4-2-1 headers (Stainless Works, 1.75" primaries).

Suspension overhaul with **Pedders XA Extreme** coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 2.5" drop), **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear), and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full chassis refresh). Braking upgraded to **AP Racing 6-piston calipers** (355mm rotors front, 330mm rear) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and braided stainless lines.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Lumina SS** widebody kit (custom-fabricated to fit LS7 swap) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders. Painted in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Hyper Blue"** with matte black accents and **3M Scotchcal Gloss Black** vinyl roof.

OEM+ interior with **Recaro SRD-E** seats (retrimmed in Alcantara with **Takata 4-point harnesses**), **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel, and **AIM MXS Strada** digital dash (integrated with Holley Dominator). Full sound deadening with **Dynamat Xtreme** and custom **Kicker QS65** component speakers.

Lightweight **Enkei RS05RR** wheels (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Custom **Vorshlag Motorsports** hood vents (carbon fiber) and **Aeromotive** fuel cell relocated to the trunk with a **Wilwood remote master cylinder**.
